name: rustcraft
description: RustCraft - 高性能AI编程助手桌面应用 | Electron + React + Rust + MCP协议
author: RustCraft Contributors

scripts.dev:browser: cd frontend && npx concurrently --names "API,UI" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:renderer"
scripts.clean: cd frontend && rm -rf dist dist-electron release
